 INTRODUCTION 
I.1. Summary 
This document is the user manual for the Copernicus Marine Ocean Monitoring Indicator (OMI). 
It provides 1D (time) time series and 2D (latitude and longitude) data of chlorophyll 
concentration trends for the period 1997-2021 for Arctic Sea, Atlantic Ocean and Global Ocean.
